goal: 修复 actor-log prefix 迁移导致 intent metadata 为空

summary.title: 兼容读取 branch-backed actor log
summary.what: 修复 actor-log prefix 迁移后的 metadata 丢失问题：sync/rebuild 现在同时读取当前 hidden actor-log ref、旧 _mainline/actor ref，以及旧 v0.4.2 binary 在新 config 下写出的 refs/heads/refs/mainline/actors 分支。远端 fetch/rewire 也补齐这个只读兼容 refspec；新 hidden actor-log 第一次创建时会优先接在 branch-backed default ref 后面，避免继续切断同一 actor 的事件链。
summary.why: eacf138 把仓库 config 的 actor_log_prefix 改成 refs/mainline/actors 后，旧 binary 会把它拼成 refs/heads/refs/mainline/actors/<actor>。旧 binary 同步时读不到 legacy sealed events，只能从 git notes 合成 merged stub，导致 log/show 里大量 intent 没有 title/goal/author；当前源码虽然能读 legacy ref，但还漏掉了这个畸形 ref，所以 int_dd74ec7d 仍会空。根因修复应该恢复 view rebuild 的 sealed-event 输入，而不是在 log 层伪造兜底标题。
summary.user_goal: 修复 actor-log prefix 迁移导致 intent metadata 为空

decisions.chose: 把 refs/heads/refs/mainline/actors/* 作为 branch-backed default actor-log rescue ref 读取和 fetch
decisions.rationale: 这是旧 binary + 新 config 组合真实写出的 ref 形状；纳入 sync 后 view 能恢复完整 sealed metadata，而不是只依赖 commit notes stub。

decisions.chose: 只给 branch-backed default ref 增加 fetch/list/migration-parent 兼容，不增加 push refspec
decisions.rationale: 当前正确写入位置仍是 refs/mainline/actors/*/log；兼容 ref 只用于读取和救回已写错的事件，不能继续推广错误写入面。

decisions.chose: 在 actor-log ref 解析、sync fetch/list 和 migration parent 层修复，而不是修改 log 渲染
decisions.rationale: 空行的根因是 view 缺少 sealed actor-log event；恢复事件输入能同时修复 log、show、status recent 等依赖 IntentView metadata 的入口。

rejected.alternative: 只在 mainline log 里用 commit subject/author 兜底显示
rejected.reason: 这只能改善一处输出，仍会让 IntentView 缺少 goal、summary、fingerprint 等结构化 metadata。

rejected.alternative: 只要求用户升级 binary 或重新 sync
rejected.reason: 已经写出的 refs/heads/refs/mainline/actors 事件不会被当前源码读取，升级后仍会遗漏 int_dd74ec7d 这类记录。

rejected.alternative: 把畸形 ref 作为新的 push 目标继续配置
rejected.reason: 它是版本错配产物；继续推送会扩大错误 ref surface。

review_notes: Dogfood：旧 v0.4.2 binary 强制 sync 后本仓 merged goal 为空的 intent 数为 185；当前源码未修前为 1；本修复后 go run . sync --json 后降为 0，int_dd74ec7d 恢复 actor、thread、goal、summary title。
没有运行 make test，遵守仓库约束。

architectural_claims: Mainline actor-log rebuild must tolerate every committed ref namespace that previous supported binaries could write after a config migration.
refs/mainline/actors/*/log remains the canonical hidden actor-log write target; refs/heads/refs/mainline/actors/* is read-only rescue compatibility.
Merged intent metadata should come from sealed actor-log events when available; git notes alone are merge evidence, not a replacement for intent summary data.
behavioral_changes: sync fetches branch-backed default actor-log refs in addition to canonical hidden refs, legacy _mainline actor refs, and notes.
view rebuild collects events from local and remote branch-backed default refs so existing malformed actor-log events can hydrate IntentView metadata.
configureRemoteRefspecs and rewire add the branch-backed default actor-log fetch refspec while still only pushing canonical hidden actor refs.
new canonical actor-log creation prefers an existing branch-backed default ref as migration parent before falling back to legacy actor refs.
migration_notes: No manual data migration is required; running sync with this code rebuilds the view from canonical, branch-backed default, and legacy actor-log refs.
